name: Aeris Gainsborough
description: Final Fantasy VII's flower girl and last of the Cetra. Aeris heals the whole party and shields allies with Planet Protector. Pure magic powerhouse!

name: Barret Wallace
description: Final Fantasy VII's gun-armed rebel leader. Barret unloads Heavy Shots, Grenade Bombs, and the devastating Catastrophe beam. All firepower, no mercy!

name: Bizzaro*Sephiroth
description: Sephiroth's twisted form from Final Fantasy VII. Commands Bolt 3, Ice 3, Fire 3, and the dreaded Heartless Angel. A multi-elemental nightmare!

name: Cait Sith
description: Final Fantasy VII's fortune-telling cat on a moogle. Cait Sith rolls Dice, drops Toy Boxes, and might just land a Lucky Girl critical!

name: Chocobo
description: Final Fantasy VII's beloved golden bird. Chocobo pecks, heals with Choco Cure, and rains down Choco Meteor. Kweh means business!

name: Chun Li
description: Street Fighter's strongest woman! Chun Li unleashes Lightning Legs and Kikoken blasts. Speed and grace with knockout power!

name: Cid Highwind
description: Final Fantasy VII's foul-mouthed pilot. Cid leaps with Hyper Jump and calls down the Highwind airship for massive damage. Tea time's over!

name: Cloud Strife
description: Final Fantasy VII's legendary SOLDIER. Cloud wields the massive Buster Sword with Omnislash and channels Restore Materia. A balanced warrior!

name: Cyan Garamonde
description: Final Fantasy VI's honorable samurai. Cyan strikes with Dispatch and Quadra Slam, channeling the ancient Bushido arts. Honor demands victory!

name: Dalton!
description: Chrono Trigger's arrogant general. Dalton hurls fireballs, lightning, and even lets out a massive Buuuurp! Gross but deadly!

name: Gafgarion
description: Final Fantasy Tactics' dark knight. Gafgarion drains life with Night Sword and Dark Sword. Your HP is his HP now!

name: Galian Beast
description: Vincent Valentine's beast form from Final Fantasy VII. Galian Beast goes berserk with raw physical fury. 100% strength, 0% chill!

name: Iron Man
description: A heavily armored warrior wielding Grand Sword techniques. Pure physical brute force with Adrenaline-fueled strikes. No magic, all muscle!

name: Kamek's Magus
description: A dark mage wielding Kamek's sorcery. Commands Lightning, Ice, Fire, and even summons Lavos itself! Bow before the Magus!

name: Kamek's Shadow
description: Kamek's shadow assassin blending ninja arts with elemental edges. Throws shurikens, wields Excalibur, and strikes from the darkness!

name: Mog
description: Final Fantasy VI's dancing moogle. Mog boogies with Sonic Boom, Cave In, and El Nino. This fuzzy dancer packs a surprising punch!

name: Olan
description: Final Fantasy Tactics' scholar-warrior. Olan fights with books, stones, and a trusty Heal spell. Brains AND brawn in one package!

name: Red XIII
description: Final Fantasy VII's fiery beast from Cosmo Canyon. Red XIII shreds foes with Sled Fang and blasts Stardust Ray. Nanaki bites back!

name: Safer*Sephiroth
description: Final Fantasy VII's ultimate villain. Safer Sephiroth rains Super Nova, Shadow Flare, and Heartless Angel. The One-Winged Angel of doom!

name: Jenova*SYNTHESIS
description: Final Fantasy VII's alien horror. Jenova SYNTHESIS absorbs life, stops time, and unleashes Ultima. Mother knows worst!

name: Tifa Lockhart
description: Final Fantasy VII's martial arts master. Tifa chains Beat Rush into Meteor Strike and unleashes Final Heaven. These fists don't miss!

name: Yuffie Kisaragi
description: Final Fantasy VII's ninja thief from Wutai. Yuffie hurls Greased Lightning, steals items, and creates All Creation. Catch her if you can!

name: Midgar Zolom
description: Final Fantasy VII's legendary serpent of the marshes. Midgar Zolom poisons, drains energy, and unleashes the feared Beta attack!

name: Ail
description: From Sailor Moon. Ail steals energy and blasts foes with his alien flute. A mysterious extraterrestrial menace with a personal force field!

name: Andrew
description: Original Character. Andrew throws arcade machines and operates skill crane games. The arcade never closes when he's fighting!

name: Ann
description: From Sailor Moon. Ann blasts with alien energy and chokes foes with telekinetic grabs. Don't let her cute disguise fool you!

name: Artemis
description: Sailor Moon's guardian cat advisor. Artemis mind melds, mauls, and fires Chaos Beams. This kitty has claws AND psychic powers!

name: Beruche
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Moon sister. Beruche commands devastating ice attacks and Dark Water. Sub-zero temperatures guaranteed!

name: Queen Beryl
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Kingdom queen. Queen Beryl summons Negaverse Warriors and fires crystal blasts. Bow before the dark throne!

name: Bobo the Vulture
description: Original Character. Bobo the Vulture throws Spinning Right Hooks, Turbo Hooks, and Atomic Uppercuts. A boxing bird with a mean streak!

name: Buburan
description: From Sailor Moon. Buburan fires Bon-Bon blasts, Cannon Balls, and puts foes to sleep with a magic flute. Sweet but deadly!

name: Bumboo Kid
description: From Sailor Moon. Bumboo Kid slashes with scissors, impales with compasses, and cuts with razor blades. Office supplies gone lethal!

name: Ceraberas
description: Original Character. Ceraberas cracks the Dark Whip and deploys mysterious droids. A shadowy warrior with tricks up their sleeve!

name: CereCere
description: Sailor Moon's Amazoness Quartet member. CereCere hurls flower hurricanes, headbashes, and summons flower monsters. Pretty and painful!

name: Sailor Ceres
description: Sailor Moon's asteroid senshi. Sailor Ceres blasts with crystal beams, heals with herbs, and chokes foes with vines. Nature's fury!

name: Sailor Chibi-Chibi
description: Sailor Moon's mysterious tiny guardian. Chibi-Chibi blasts, hugs to heal, and summons protective shields. Small but cosmically powerful!

name: SailorStar Chibi-Moon
description: Sailor Moon's future warrior princess. Chibi-Moon fires Pink Sugar Heart Attacks and wields Luna-P gadgets. Freezes foes with kisses!

name: Cooan
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Moon sister. Cooan rains Dark Fire and Nega-Bombs on her enemies. Hot-tempered in every sense!

name: Sailor Cosmos
description: Sailor Moon's ultimate guardian from the far future. Sailor Cosmos unleashes cosmic shockwaves, star beams, and revives the fallen!

name: Cyprine and Ptilol
description: Sailor Moon's twin witches. Cyprine and Ptilol blast in tandem and shield each other. Two-for-one destruction!

name: Diana
description: Sailor Moon's kitten guardian. Diana mind melds and scratches, then overwhelms you with questions. Adorably dangerous!

name: Prince Dimando
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Moon prince. Dimando hypnotizes, blasts with eye beams, and summons energy shields. Royal and ruthless!

name: The Dream Princess
description: From Sailor Moon. The Dream Princess weaves snake wreaths and apple curses. Sweet dreams become your worst nightmare!

name: Prince Endymion
description: Sailor Moon's noble prince. Endymion throws roses, strikes with his sword, and protects allies. Romance meets combat!

name: Esmeraude
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Moon villainess. Esmeraude shocks with green electricity and impales with dark hedges. That laugh is deadly!

name: Eudial
description: Sailor Moon's Witches 5 fire specialist. Eudial summons Daimons and blasts with the Fire Buster. She's got traps everywhere!

name: Evil Prince Endymion
description: Sailor Moon's brainwashed prince. Evil Endymion wields black roses and dark crystal energy. The good prince gone terribly wrong!

name: Sailorstarfighter
description: Sailor Moon's Starlight warrior. Sailor Star Fighter fires Star Serious Laser with pinpoint accuracy. Starlight power cuts through all!

name: Fiore
description: From the Sailor Moon R movie. Fiore commands Kisenian flowers and drains energy. Love twisted into vengeance!

name: Fish Eye
description: Sailor Moon's Amazon Trio member. Fish Eye freezes foes, tosses daggers, and traps with nets. Fabulous AND lethal!

name: Sailor Galaxia
description: Sailor Moon's golden-armored conqueror. Galaxia unleashes star columns, comet rain, and golden whips. The most feared senshi!

name: Game Machine Man
description: From Sailor Moon. Game Machine Man hurls arcade cabinets and snares foes with claws. Insert coin to continue... if you survive!

name: Greg
description: From Sailor Moon. Greg reads minds, fires rainbow crystal beams, and boosts psychic waves. Knowledge IS power!

name: Miss Haruna
description: Sailor Moon's long-suffering teacher. Miss Haruna grades papers into weapons and rings the Cowbell of doom. Class is in session!

name: Hawk Eye
description: Sailor Moon's Amazon Trio member. Hawk Eye breathes fire, throws daggers, and extracts dream mirrors. A circus nightmare!

name: Sailorstarhealer
description: Sailor Moon's Starlight healer. Sailor Star Healer fires Star Sensitive Inferno for massive damage. Healing star power that burns!

name: Jadeite
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Kingdom general. Jadeite disguises, drains energy, and blasts with Negaverse power. Deceptively dangerous!

name: JunJun
description: Sailor Moon's Amazoness Quartet acrobat. JunJun headbashes, steals HP, and delivers acrobatic heel kicks. Tough and tumbling!

name: SailorStar Jupiter
description: Sailor Moon's thunder senshi. Jupiter unleashes Supreme Thunder Dragon and Oak Evolution. The mightiest physical Sailor fighter!

name: Princess Snow Kaguya
description: From Sailor Moon. Princess Snow Kaguya freezes everything with ice breath and spiral blasts. An eternal winter awaits!

name: Sailor Kakyuu
description: Sailor Moon's Kinmoku princess. Sailor Kakyuu heals and unleashes Kinmoku Fusion Tempest. Royal flower power at its finest!

name: Tuxedo Kamen
description: Sailor Moon's masked hero. Tuxedo Kamen throws roses, swings his cane, and drops speeches. Style AND substance!

name: Kaolinite
description: Sailor Moon's Witches 5 leader. Kaolinite whips with her hair, shocks with electricity, and hurls ice shards. Tangled pain!

name: Tsukikage no Knight
description: Sailor Moon's moonlight knight. Tsukikage no Knight slashes swords and throws white roses. A mysterious protector from the desert!

name: Kunzite
description: Sailor Moon's strongest Dark Kingdom general. Kunzite steals energy, steals moves, and unleashes shadow dragons. The ultimate thief!

name: Black Lady
description: Sailor Moon's corrupted future princess. Black Lady fires dark mirrors and spirals of shadow. Innocence twisted into dark power!

name: Sailor Lethe
description: Sailor Moon's river guardian. Sailor Lethe fires Galactica blasts and drowns memories in the River of Oblivion. Forget everything!

name: Luna
description: Sailor Moon's wise guardian cat. Luna mind melds, flips, and sneaks from the shadows. Don't underestimate this feline advisor!

name: The Makaiju
description: Sailor Moon's alien life-tree. The Makaiju drains HP and SP, poisons with pods, and smashes with roots. An alien force of nature!

name: Sailorstarmaker
description: Sailor Moon's Starlight creator. Sailor Star Maker fires Star Gentle Uterus and shields with the star locket. Cosmic creation power!

name: SailorStar Mars
description: Sailor Moon's fire senshi. Mars unleashes Fire Soul Bird and Mars Flame Sniper. Sacred flames purify all evil!

name: Tuxedo Melvin
description: Sailor Moon's lovable nerd hero. Tuxedo Melvin throws CD-ROMs, uploads viruses, and attacks with HTTP. The internet's mightiest warrior!

name: SailorStar Mercury
description: Sailor Moon's water senshi. Mercury freezes foes with Shine Aqua Illusion and scans weaknesses. Intelligence is the ultimate weapon!

name: Queen Metallia
description: Sailor Moon's ultimate Dark Kingdom force. Queen Metallia unleashes devastating Nega Blasts and tornadoes. Pure evil energy incarnate!

name: Mimete
description: Sailor Moon's Witches 5 idol. Mimete summons Daimons, sings to drain, and blasts with star shards. A deadly fangirl!

name: Mistress 9
description: Sailor Moon's vessel of destruction. Mistress 9 wraps foes in hair, summons Daimons, and brings The Silence. The end begins here!

name: Sailor Mnemosyne
description: Sailor Moon's memory guardian. Sailor Mnemosyne heals with water, shields allies, and rushes with memories. Past meets present!

name: Eternal Sailormoon
description: Sailor Moon's ultimate form! Eternal Moon fires Moon Gorgeous Meditation and Silver Moon Crystal Power Kiss. Love conquers ALL!

name: Sailor Iron Mouse
description: Sailor Moon's Animamate mouse. Iron Mouse fires rapid Galactica blasts. Small, fast, and overwhelmingly annoying to fight!

name: Naoko Takeuchi
description: Sailor Moon's real-world creator cameo! Naoko Takeuchi attacks with manga pages and summons dark villains. The pen IS mightier!

name: Osaka Naru
description: Sailor Moon's loyal friend. Naru channels the power of love into healing and cherry bomb blasts. Heart and courage in one!

name: Queen Nehelenia
description: Sailor Moon's nightmare queen. Nehelenia shatters dream mirrors and fires golden crystal blasts. Beautiful terror!

name: Neo-Queen Serenity
description: Sailor Moon's future queen. Neo-Queen Serenity heals, revives, and fires Moon Crystal Power. Pure magical supremacy!

name: Nephrite
description: Sailor Moon's star-reading general. Nephrite fires cosmic star rain and drains hearts. The stars foretell your defeat!

name: SailorStar Neptune
description: Sailor Moon's ocean senshi. Neptune submerges foes with Deep Submerge and reflects attacks with Aqua Mirror. Elegant destruction!

name: Sailor Heavy Metal Papillon
description: Sailor Moon's butterfly Animamate. Heavy Metal Papillon swarms with butterflies and soul attacks. Wings of beauty, sting of death!

name: ParaPara
description: Sailor Moon's Amazoness Quartet trickster. ParaPara swings balls, jabs with poolsticks, and casts aging spells. Youth is her weapon!

name: Pegasus
description: Sailor Moon's dream guardian. Pegasus heals with moon beams and charges with ram attacks. A mystical winged protector!

name: Peruru
description: From the Sailor Moon SuperS movie. Peruru hypnotizes with his flute and powers up with super cookies. Sweet-toothed dream fairy!

name: Petz
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Moon sister. Petz strikes with dark thunder and summons hypnotic droids. Lightning with a dark twist!

name: SailorStar Pluto
description: Sailor Moon's time senshi. Pluto screams Dead Scream, stops time, and bends chronology. Guardian of the time gate!

name: Pox
description: Original Character. Pox growls, headbutts, and bashes with raw claws. A feral beast with pure physical aggression!

name: Puppet
description: From Sailor Moon. Puppet drains energy, traps souls in bottles, and summons maid attacks. A sinister puppeteer pulling deadly strings!

name: Ririka the Vampire
description: From Sailor Moon. Ririka drinks blood, hides behind wing shields, and summons vampire hordes. A sweet-faced bloodsucker!

name: Rubeus
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Moon commander. Rubeus blasts dark energy through shields and fires pulsating dark streams. Fiery-haired fury!

name: Sailor V
description: Sailor Moon's original hero identity! Sailor V kicks, chops, punches, and fires Crescent Beams. The OG magical girl vigilante!

name: SailorStar Saturn
description: Sailor Moon's silence senshi. Saturn swings the Silence Glaive for devastating attacks and raises Silence Walls. Apocalyptic power!

name: Queen Serenity
description: Sailor Moon's ancient lunar queen. Queen Serenity heals, casts Holy, and revives the fallen. The Silver Millennium's ultimate protector!

name: The Invincible Shadow
description: From Sailor Moon. The Invincible Shadow massacres with physical strikes and fires massive energy blasts. Simple, brutal, effective!

name: Techniclon
description: From Sailor Moon. Techniclon drains with leeches, shocks with lightning beakers, and Butt Splats. Don't ask, just dodge!

name: Tellu
description: Sailor Moon's Witches 5 botanist. Tellu commands mutant plants, raises plant walls, and sics vine armies. Nature's dark side!

name: Terakoya
description: From Sailor Moon. Terakoya attacks with love letters that cause chaos and painful paper cuts. Love hurts... literally!

name: Tetis, the Youma of Water
description: From Sailor Moon. Tetis disguises as water, deep freezes foes, and summons dark tidal waves. A shape-shifting aquatic terror!

name: Tiger Eye
description: Sailor Moon's Amazon Trio member. Tiger Eye holds shadows, throws daggers, and trips with sticks. A wild circus performer!

name: SailorStar Uranus
description: Sailor Moon's sky senshi. Uranus shakes the world and blasts with the Space Sword. Raw physical dominance from the sky!

name: Queen Vadiana
description: From the Sailor Moon SuperS movie. Queen Vadiana traps foes in black dream holes and drains with dream coffins. Sweet dreams are over!

name: Veena
description: Original Character. Veena rains boulders, draws snakes, and tickles with feathers. A quirky mage with earth-shaking power!

name: SailorStar Venus
description: Sailor Moon's love senshi. Venus chains foes with Love Me Chain and shocks with Love And Beauty Shock. Love is a battlefield!

name: VesVes
description: Sailor Moon's Amazoness Quartet beast tamer. VesVes hexes computers, steals HP, and jabs with poolsticks. Wild and unpredictable!

name: Viluy
description: Sailor Moon's Witches 5 hacker. Viluy drains with computers, uploads viruses, and morphs via ChUB Access. Digital destruction!

name: Wiseman
description: Sailor Moon's puppeteer of doom. Wiseman chokes, brainwashes, and rains showers of destruction. The true Dark Moon mastermind!

name: Zirconia
description: Sailor Moon's mirror sorceress. Zirconia reflects attacks, crushes hearts, and traps foes in mirror mazes. Reflections of pain!

name: Zoisite
description: Sailor Moon's cunning general. Zoisite whirls cherry blossoms, hurls ice crystals, and blazes with fire. Beautiful but deadly!

name: Artificial 13
description: Dragon Ball Z's combined android. Artificial 13 kicks mountains, crushes heads, and recharges mid-fight. Parts sold separately!
Dragon Ball Z's towering android #14. Backfists, headcrushes, and powers up with devices. Silent but devastating!
Dragon Ball Z's stealthy android #15. Mountain kicks, headcrushes, and throws razor-sharp hats. Small but packing serious heat!

name: Artificial 16
description: Dragon Ball Z's gentle giant android. Android 16 fires Hell's Flash and rocket punches. Nature-loving but battle-ready!

name: Artificial 17
description: Dragon Ball Z's rebellious android. Android 17 fires finger blasts, smashes fists, and recharges. Infinite power, infinite attitude!

name: Artificial 18
description: Dragon Ball Z's fashionable android. Android 18 fires energy waves, delivers hip attacks, and bloody knees. Stylish destruction!

name: Artificial 19
description: Dragon Ball Z's energy-absorbing android. Android 19 drains power with both hands and fires eye beams. Your energy is his!

name: Artificial 20
description: Dragon Ball Z's elder android. Android 20 steals KI, fires eye beams and arm cannons. Dr. Gero's ultimate creation!

name: Baata
description: Dragon Ball Z's Ginyu Force speedster. Burter boosts speed and crashes in as the Purple Comet. Fastest in the universe!

name: Majin Babidi
description: Dragon Ball Z's evil wizard. Babidi summons Dabura, Majin Buu, and Majin Vegeta. Why fight when minions do it for you?

name: Bebi
description: Dragon Ball GT's parasitic Tuffle. Baby takes over bodies with a single touch. One morph and you're fighting your own ally!

name: Bojack
description: Dragon Ball Z's galactic pirate. Bojack slashes energy, smashes hammers, and fires the Galactic Buster. Space terror incarnate!

name: Brolli
description: Dragon Ball Z's Legendary Super Saiyan. Broly rains relentless energy blasts and smashes with atomic force. Unstoppable berserker rage!

name: Majin Buu
description: Dragon Ball Z's pink terror. Majin Buu fires Genocide Attacks and Kamehamehas. Candy won't save you from this menace!

name: Cell
description: Dragon Ball Z's perfect bio-android. Cell uses Kamehameha, Makankosappo, AND Kienzan -- everyone's moves stolen! Perfection achieved!

name: Cell Jr
description: Dragon Ball Z's mini menaces. Cell Jr fires Kamehameha and Makankosappo just like daddy. Small but horrifyingly strong!

name: Chaozu
description: Dragon Ball Z's psychic warrior. Chiaotzu fires Dodonpa, goes Kamikaze, and freezes foes with telekinesis. Tiny but explosive!

name: Dabura
description: Dragon Ball Z's Demon King. Dabura petrifies with spit, blasts KI, and burns with hellfire. The ruler of the Demon Realm!

name: Piccolo Daimao
description: Dragon Ball's original Demon King Piccolo. Fires Bakurikimaha and Makosen blasts with Namekian regeneration. The OG green menace!

name: Dende
description: Dragon Ball Z's young Namekian healer. Dende heals everything and calls Piccolo for backup. The ultimate support character!

name: Freeza
description: Dragon Ball Z's galactic emperor. Frieza fires Death Balls, eye beams, and goes 100% power. You WILL kneel before him!

name: Garlic Jr
description: Dragon Ball Z's immortal demon. Garlic Jr summons henchmen, stretches, and regenerates. You can't kill what won't stay dead!

name: Gill
description: Dragon Ball GT's robot companion. Gill absorbs energy and fires cannons. Small package, big boom!

name: Ginger
description: Dragon Ball Z's spice warrior. Ginger slashes swords, blasts energy, and calls the triple team. Garlic Jr's loyal henchman!

name: Ginyu
description: Dragon Ball Z's body-swapping captain. Ginyu changes bodies with one move! Pray he doesn't pick yours!

name: Ultimate Gojiita
description: Dragon Ball's ultimate fusion warrior. Gogeta fires Big Bang Kamehameha for world-ending damage. The ultimate tag team!

name: Gohan
description: Dragon Ball Z's scholarly warrior. Gohan goes Mystic and fires Masenko and Kamehameha. Hidden power surpassing his father!

name: Goku
description: Dragon Ball Z's legendary Super Saiyan. Goku fires Kamehameha, Spirit Bomb, and Dragon Fist. The ultimate warrior!

name: Goten
description: Dragon Ball Z's young half-Saiyan. Goten fires Kamekameha, goes Super Saiyan, and calls double teams. Like father, like son!

name: Gotenks
description: Dragon Ball Z's fusion prankster. Gotenks goes Super Saiyan 3 and sends Super Ghost Kamikaze! Comedy AND power!

name: Guld
description: Dragon Ball Z's Ginyu Force psychic. Guldo freezes time and freezes foes in place. Slow but impossibly tricky!

name: The Eldest Namek
description: Dragon Ball Z's ancient Namekian elder. The Great Elder unlocks hidden strength and heals. Wisdom is the greatest power!

name: Hildegarn
description: Dragon Ball Z's giant phantom beast. Hildegarn teleports, wraps with its tail, and breathes devastating fire. Kaiju-sized threat!

name: Janenba
description: Dragon Ball Z's dimension-ripping demon. Janenba stabs, heals through rifts, and delivers furious combos. Reality bends to his will!

name: Janenba
description: Dragon Ball Z's orb-wielding demon form. Janenba fires colored orbs with devastating effects. A rainbow of destruction!

name: Jees
description: Dragon Ball Z's Ginyu Force blaster. Jeice fires Crasher Balls and crashes as the Purple Comet. Red Magma meets speed!

name: Kaiou-bit
description: Dragon Ball Z's fused Supreme Kai. Kibito Kai fires wave shocks and energy thrusts with divine healing. Supreme divine power!

name: Kaioushin
description: Dragon Ball Z's Supreme Kai. Kaioushin fires wave shocks and devastating Gekiretsushinoho. The universe's highest authority!

name: Kibito
description: Dragon Ball Z's divine attendant. Kibito heals allies, cures all, and charges in with powerful punches. Heavenly support!

name: Kooler
description: Dragon Ball Z's Frieza's brother. Cooler fires Death Balls, eye beams, and upgrades to metal form. Colder than Frieza!

name: Krillin
description: Dragon Ball Z's bald warrior hero. Krillin fires Kamehameha and Kienzan discs with Taiyoken blinds. The strongest human alive!

name: Kuwii
description: Dragon Ball Z's cowardly soldier. Cui blasts, kicks, and runs when outmatched. His scouter says you're toast... maybe!

name: Mirai Gohan
description: Dragon Ball Z's future timeline hero. Future Gohan goes Super Saiyan and fires Kamehameha. One arm, infinite courage!

name: Master Roshi
description: Dragon Ball's legendary master. Roshi fires Kamehameha, fights drunk, and always has a Senzu Bean. The original turtle hermit!

name: Mister Satan
description: Dragon Ball Z's world champ. Mr. Satan delivers Dynamite Kicks and the legendary Megaton Punch! All hype, maximum heart!

name: Mirai Trunks
description: Dragon Ball Z's future sword warrior. Trunks goes Super Saiyan, sword slices, and fires Burning Attack. Time-traveling hero!

name: Nail
description: Dragon Ball Z's Namekian warrior. Nail fires Inazuma-ha, slashes claws, and regenerates. Piccolo's other half!

name: Nappa
description: Dragon Ball Z's Saiyan brute. Nappa goes Oozaru, summons Saibamen, and fires his ultimate attack. Bald, buff, and brutal!

name: Nicky
description: Dragon Ball Z's Garlic Jr henchman. Nicky fires energy blasts, swings swords, and calls the triple team. One of three deadly foes!

name: Pan
description: Dragon Ball GT's spirited quarter-Saiyan. Pan fires Kamehameha and delivers atomic blitz combos. Grandpa's fighting spirit!

name: Piccolo
description: Dragon Ball Z's Namekian hero. Piccolo fires Makankosappo, the ultimate beam cannon, and regenerates. Green, mean, fighting machine!

name: Puar
description: Dragon Ball's shape-shifting cat. Puar transforms into anything with one morph! One move, infinite possibilities!

name: Raditz
description: Dragon Ball Z's Saiyan invader. Raditz scouters, goes Oozaru, and fires KI blasts. Goku's evil brother means business!

name: Recoom
description: Dragon Ball Z's Ginyu Force muscle. Recoome fires the Eraser Cannon and delivers devastating attacks. Flamboyant AND powerful!

name: Great Saiyaman
description: Dragon Ball Z's superhero alter ego. Great Saiyaman fires cannons and delivers justice kicks. Crime doesn't pay!

name: Super Buu
description: Dragon Ball Z's evolved Buu. Super Buu fires Genocide Attacks, absorbs fighters, and blasts shockwaves. Smarter and deadlier!

name: Lord Slug
description: Dragon Ball Z's evil Super Namekian. Lord Slug poisons, stretches, and grows to giant size. Ancient evil reborn!

name: SSJ2 Gohan
description: Dragon Ball Z's unleashed warrior. SSJ2 Gohan fires Kamehameha and relentless energy barrages. Father-surpassing power!

name: Super Goku 4
description: Dragon Ball GT's ultimate form. Super Goku 4 fires 10x Kamehameha and Dragon Fist Explosion. Maximum monkey power!

name: Super #17
description: Dragon Ball GT's ultimate android fusion. Super 17 absorbs energy and fires Flash Bombs. Powered by your attacks!

name: Super Vegeta 4
description: Dragon Ball GT's Saiyan prince evolved. Super Vegeta 4 fires Final Shine and Kienzan. The prince at peak power!

name: Tapion
description: Dragon Ball Z's legendary hero. Tapion charges with his sword and plays the melody. Ancient courage reforged!

name: Tien
description: Dragon Ball Z's three-eyed warrior. Tien fires Kikoho, Dodonpa, and the blinding Taiyoken. Triclops with a killer punch!

name: Trunks
description: Dragon Ball Z's young Saiyan prince. Trunks goes Super Saiyan and pummels foes. Royal blood, wild spirit!

name: Turles
description: Dragon Ball Z's evil space pirate. Turles fires energy blasts, barrages furiously, and goes Oozaru. Goku's dark mirror!

name: Ubuu
description: Dragon Ball Z's reincarnated warrior. Uub fires Kamehameha and blinds with Taiyoken. Buu's power reborn as a hero!

name: Vegeta-Bebi
description: Dragon Ball GT's possessed prince. Vegeta-Baby fires Revenge Death Balls and goes Golden Oozaru. Royal rage amplified!

name: Vegeta
description: Dragon Ball Z's Saiyan prince. Vegeta fires Final Flash, Big Bang Attack, and energy barrages. The Prince of All Saiyans!

name: Vegetto
description: Dragon Ball Z's Potara fusion. Vegetto fires Perfect Kamehameha and Ki Sword. Goku plus Vegeta equals unstoppable!

name: Videl
description: Dragon Ball Z's crime-fighting heroine. Videl fires Kamehameha, calls Gohan, and swings frying pans. Justice has no limits!

name: Yamcha
description: Dragon Ball Z's desert bandit. Yamcha fires Soukidan and Wolf Fang Fist. The OG Z-Fighter still packs a punch!

name: Zangya
description: Dragon Ball Z's galaxy warrior. Zangya fires rapid energy shots and spark lasers. Bojack's most dangerous lieutenant!

name: Zarbon
description: Dragon Ball Z's vain warrior. Zarbon morphs into monster form and fires KI blasts. Pretty face hides a beast within!

name: Arbok
description: A wild Arbok appeared! This poison snake wraps, bites, and sprays acid. Its glare paralyzes before the venom hits!

name: Ash Ketchum
description: Pokemon's legendary trainer! Ash commands Pikachu, Charmander, Bulbasaur, and more. Gotta catch 'em all!

name: Beedrill
description: A wild Beedrill appeared! Fury Attack, Twineedle, and Pin Missile rain down. This angry bee swarm means PAIN!

name: Blastoise
description: Pokemon's heavy artillery turtle! Blastoise blasts Hydro Pump and Skull Bashes. Those cannons aren't for show!

name: Bulbasaur
description: Pokemon's iconic starter! Bulbasaur tackles, drains with Leech Seed, and whips with vines. Evolves into Ivysaur mid-fight!

name: Butterfree
description: A wild Butterfree appeared! Confusion, poison powder, sleep powder, and psybeams. Beautiful bug shuts you down!

name: Caterpie
description: Pokemon's humble caterpillar. Caterpie tackles and shoots string. Evolves into Metapod -- hang in there, little buddy!

name: Charizard
description: Pokemon's fire-breathing dragon! Charizard slashes, rages, and unleashes Flamethrower and Fire Spin. The ultimate fire starter!

name: Charmander
description: Pokemon's fiery starter! Charmander scratches and embers, then evolves into Charmeleon. That tail flame burns with potential!

name: Charmeleon
description: Pokemon's mid-evolution fire lizard. Charmeleon scratches, rages, slashes, and evolves into Charizard. Getting hotter!

name: Clefable
description: A wild Clefable appeared! Sings foes to sleep, Doubleslaps, and uses random Metronome. Anything can happen!

name: Clefairy
description: A wild Clefairy appeared! Sings, slaps, and Metronomes random moves. Cute AND unpredictable -- evolves into Clefable!

name: Ekans
description: A wild Ekans appeared! Wraps, poisons, and bites. This snake's glare freezes you solid before striking!

name: Fearow
description: A wild Fearow appeared! Fury Attack, Drill Peck, and Mirror Move. This fierce bird copies your best moves!

name: Nidoran (f)
description: A wild Nidoran appeared! Scratches, poisons, and bites. This little bunny evolves into the mighty Nidoqueen!

name: Ivysaur
description: Pokemon's mid-evolution grass type. Ivysaur drains with Leech Seed and slices Razor Leaf. Evolves into Venusaur!

name: Kakuna
description: A wild Kakuna appeared! Harden... and that's it. But evolve into Beedrill and watch out!

name: Meowth
description: A wild Meowth appeared! Scratches, bites, and throws Pay Day coins. Evolves into Persian! That's right!

name: Metapod
description: A wild Metapod appeared! Harden is all it knows, but Butterfree is one evolution away. Patience is key!

name: Mew
description: Pokemon's mythical ancestor. Mew transforms, mega punches, and fires Psychic blasts. Contains DNA of every Pokemon!

name: Mewtwo
description: Pokemon's ultimate psychic weapon. Mewtwo fires Psychic, recovers HP, and raises barriers. Genetically engineered perfection!

name: Missingno.
description: Pokemon's legendary glitch! MissingNo fires Sky Attack and Water Gun. A corrupted anomaly that breaks all the rules!

name: Nidoran (m)
description: A wild Nidoran appeared! Horns, poison, and fury attacks. This little guy evolves into fearsome Nidoking!

name: Nidoking
description: A wild Nidoking appeared! Thrashes, horn attacks, and poisons. The evolved king of venom hits like a truck!

name: Nidoqueen
description: A wild Nidoqueen appeared! Body slams, scratches, and poisons. The queen's raw power is not to be underestimated!

name: Nidorina
description: A wild Nidorina appeared! Bites, scratches, and double kicks. Evolves into mighty Nidoqueen!

name: Nidorino
description: A wild Nidorino appeared! Horn attacks, fury strikes, and Horn Drill! Evolves into mighty Nidoking!

name: Persian
description: A wild Persian appeared! Slashes, bites, and fires Pay Day coins. This classy cat has Fury Swipes for days!

name: Pidgeot
description: A wild Pidgeot appeared! Gusts, Wing Attacks, and Mirror Moves make this the king of the skies!

name: Pidgeotto
description: A wild Pidgeotto appeared! Gusts, quick attacks, and wing strikes. Evolves into the majestic Pidgeot!

name: Pidgey
description: A wild Pidgey appeared! Gusts and wing attacks from this tiny bird. Every champion starts small!

name: Pikachu
description: Pokemon's iconic electric mouse! Pikachu zaps with Thundershock and Thunder. Shockingly powerful! Evolves into Raichu!

name: Raichu
description: A wild Raichu appeared! Thundershock and Thunder Wave from Pikachu's evolved form. Maximum voltage!

name: Sabrina
description: Pokemon's psychic gym leader! Sabrina powers up, recovers, and fires Psychic Attacks. Her mind is her deadliest weapon!

name: Sandshrew
description: A wild Sandshrew appeared! Scratches, sand attacks, and poison stings. Evolves into Sandslash!

name: Sandslash
description: A wild Sandslash appeared! Scratches, slashes, and Fury Swipes with deadly claws. A spiny ball of sandy destruction!

name: Spearow
description: A wild Spearow appeared! Pecks and Fury Attacks from this tiny angry bird. Evolves into the fearsome Fearow!

name: Squirtle
description: Pokemon's adorable water starter! Squirtle tackles, bubbles, and bites. Small shell, big Blastoise potential!

name: Venusaur
description: Pokemon's fully-evolved grass titan! Venusaur drains with Leech Seed, Razor Leaf, and fires Solar Beam. Nature's champion!

name: Wartortle
description: Pokemon's mid-evolution water turtle. Wartortle tackles, bites, and Skull Bashes. Getting stronger toward Blastoise!

name: Weedle
description: A wild Weedle appeared! Poison Sting and String Shot. Evolves into Kakuna then deadly Beedrill!

name: Akuma
description: Street Fighter's demon warrior! Akuma fires Hadoukens, Hurricane Kicks, and Shoryukens. The master of the fist!

name: Batsu
description: Rival Schools' hot-blooded student. Batsu punches with fire fists and delivers shooting star kicks. School spirit EXTREME!

name: M.Bison
description: Street Fighter's fearsome dictator! M. Bison fires Psycho Bombs, stomps, and steals your moves. Kneel before Shadaloo!

name: Captin America
description: Marvel's star-spangled Avenger! Captain America hurls his shield and charges Stars and Stripes. Liberty never looked so tough!

name: Chicken
description: Original Character. It's a chicken! Pecks, lays eggs, and somehow summons a COW. Don't underestimate the barnyard!

name: Chun Li
description: Street Fighter's strongest woman (duplicate). Chun Li unleashes Lightning Legs and Kikoken. The fastest kicks in the world!

name: Claire Redfield
description: Resident Evil 2's brave survivor. Claire fires guns, slashes knives, and torches with flamethrowers. Survival horror fights!

name: Captin Commando
description: Capcom's futuristic hero! Captain Commando fires wrist flames and calls teammates. Commando justice!

name: Cyclops
description: X-Men's optic blast leader! Cyclops fires eye lasers in combos and dashes. One look and you're done!

name: Donovan
description: Darkstalkers' vampire hunter. Donovan channels flame, lightning, and blizzard through his cursed sword. Monster slayer!

name: Felicia
description: Darkstalkers' catgirl fighter! Felicia kicks, spikes, rolls, and calls friends. Purr-fectly deadly in a dance fight!

name: Firedog
description: Original Character. Firedog breathes flames, spins fire, and shields with infernos. A blazing hot good boy!

name: Gambit
description: X-Men's Cajun card shark! Gambit throws charged cards and explodes chains. Mon ami, you're in trouble!

name: Havok
description: X-Men's plasma powerhouse! Havok fires plasma bursts, walls, and quakes the ground. Alex Summers brings the heat!

name: Hinata
description: Rival Schools' sunny fighter! Hinata uppercuts, tornado kicks, and machine-gun punches. Cheerful spirit, devastating combos!

name: Hulk
description: Marvel's strongest there is! Hulk charges, grabs, and Gamma Quakes. The angrier he gets, the stronger he gets!

name: I Suck to much Char
description: Original Character. I Suck Too Much has a weak punch and calls Backstreet Boys for help. The ultimate joke fighter!

name: Jin
description: Cyberbots' mech pilot! Jin fires Blodia Punches and ground explosions. Giant robot fists pack a wallop!

name: Jubilee
description: X-Men's sparkle blaster! Jubilee fires light blasts, pyrokinetic balls, and goes Nova. Fireworks that actually hurt!

name: Ken Masters
description: Street Fighter's fiery rival! Ken Masters fires Hadoukens, Hurricane Kicks, and Shoryukens. Ryu's best friend, worst enemy!

name: Kyosuke
description: Rival Schools' cool disciplinarian. Kyosuke fires Cross Cutters, Ground Shocks, and Air Blades. Style in every strike!

name: Leon
description: Resident Evil's rookie cop. Leon punches, knifes, and shoots. Simple tools, survival instincts, can-do attitude!

name: Lilith Aensland
description: Darkstalkers' succubus clone! Lilith fires Soul Flash, Merry Turn, and the Gloomy Puppet Show. Cute but creepy!

name: MegaMan
description: Capcom's Blue Bomber! MegaMan fires X Buster, copies weapons, and summons Zero. A dozen weapons in one hero!

name: Mega Man X
description: Mega Man X's upgraded reploid hero. X fires X-Buster, Storm Tornado, and even Hadoken! The reploid rebellion starts here!

name: Morrigan Aensland
description: Darkstalkers' succubus queen! Morrigan fires Soul Fists and Darkness Illusions. Deadly beauty from the demon world!

name: Mystique
description: X-Men's shape-shifting spy! Mystique shoots lasers, morphs into tigers, and copies identities. Never know who she is!

name: Natsu
description: Rival Schools' volleyball star! Natsu serves, fire spikes, and digs with athletic fury. Sports meets combat!

name: PhReAkx0iD
description: Original Character. PhReAkx0iD smacks, summons newbies, and throws questionable substances. Maximum chaos!

name: Polaris
description: X-Men's magnetic warrior! Polaris suffocates with metal, throws knives, and drops buildings. Magneto's daughter means business!

name: Psylocke
description: X-Men's psychic ninja! Psylocke slashes with psi-blades, mind-heals, and Frankensteiners foes. Telepathy meets martial arts!

name: Roll
description: Mega Man's helper robot! Roll punches, busts, heals, and fires Toasters from Hell! Don't mess with the sister!

name: Ryu
description: Street Fighter's wandering warrior! Ryu fires fireballs, spin kicks, and Dragon Punches. The eternal world warrior!

name: Sakura
description: Street Fighter's schoolgirl fighter! Sakura throws fireballs and hurricane kicks. She learned by watching Ryu!

name: Sentinel
description: X-Men's mutant-hunting robot! Sentinel fires lasers, dashes, and self-destructs. Cold, metallic, and relentless!

name: Shadow Lady
description: Street Fighter's cyborg Chun Li! Shadow Lady electrifies, drill charges, and fires homing missiles. Upgraded for max damage!

name: Spiderman
description: Marvel's web-slinging hero! Spider-Man stings, webs, and Maximum Spiders. Your friendly neighborhood knockout artist!

name: SQ L SL
description: Original Character. SQ L SL kills, kicks, fireballs, and morphs with a massive arsenal. Jack-of-all-trades!

name: Storm
description: X-Men's weather goddess! Storm bolts lightning, hails ice, and summons tornadoes. Mother Nature's fury unleashed!

name: Strider Hiryu
description: Capcom's futuristic ninja! Strider Hiryu slices with Gram and summons Legion. The fastest blade alive!

name: Syoma
description: Rival Schools' baseball slugger! Syoma swings for home runs and pitches fastballs. Batter up for a knockout!

name: Venom
description: Marvel's symbiote villain! Venom fangs, webs, and terrifies. Eddie Brock's dark side bites back -- literally!

name: War Machine
description: Marvel's armored Avenger! War Machine fires solar cannons, smart bombs, and repulsors. Like Iron Man but MORE guns!

name: Wolverine
description: X-Men's adamantium-clawed berserker! Wolverine barrages, drill claws, and rages. The best at what he does!

name: Zangief
description: Street Fighter's wrestling bear-fighter! Zangief spins lariats, grabs, and Atomic Busters. Pure grappling devastation!

name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
description: Star Wars' legendary Jedi! Obi-Wan uses mind tricks and wields his lightsaber. The Force is strong with this one!

name: C-3P0
description: Star Wars' golden protocol droid. C-3PO communicates and attacks. The odds of surviving are 3,720 to 1!

name: Chadra-Fan
description: Star Wars' small alien scavenger. Chadra-Fan scans, heals, steals items, and kidnaps. Tiny but sneaky!

name: Chewbacca
description: Star Wars' mighty Wookiee! Chewbacca smuggles HP, fires blasters, and punches hard. Let the Wookiee win!

name: Death Star
description: Star Wars' planet-destroying superweapon! The Death Star fires one move: the Superlaser. One shot. That's all it needs!

name: Elon
description: Original Character. Elon attacks, detects lies, and heals with the Force. A mysterious force-sensitive warrior!

name: Gran
description: Star Wars' rotund alien. Gran tosses Kinyen Bombs and attacks. Simple but explosive!

name: Princess Leia Organa
description: Star Wars' rebel princess! Leia heals with dignity and shoots with her blaster. A leader on the front lines!

name: Luke Skywalker
description: Star Wars' farm boy turned Jedi! Luke wields a lightsaber and fires blasters. The galaxy's last hope!

name: R2-D2
description: Star Wars' resourceful astromech! R2-D2 uses arms, serves drinks, and fires mini-beams. Beep boop, you lose!

name: Sailor Alpha
description: Original Character. Sailor Alpha fires ultimate elemental attacks, heals, and copies enemy moves. A versatile magical warrior!

name: Proto
description: Original Character. Proto poisons with slime, morphs forms, and pulls out an AK-47. Unpredictable and heavily armed!

name: Nega Band Director
description: Original Character. Nega Band Director attacks with metronomes, baton beams, and dissonance. March to HIS beat or else!

name: Nega Sailor Drum Major
description: Original Character. Nega Drum Major blasts, plays fight songs, and conducts tempo changes. The halftime show of DOOM!

name: Sailor Gamma
description: Original Character. Sailor Gamma radiates poison and blinds with gamma rays. Nuclear-powered magical girl!

name: Sailor Lucca
description: Original Character fusing Chrono Trigger tech with Sailor power. Sailor Lucca tosses flames and hypnotizes. Fire mage supreme!

name: Tuxedo Macintosh
description: Original Character. Tuxedo Macintosh bashes Dells, throws flaming Compaqs, and heals with Power Macs. Tech support gets physical!

name: A Magikoopa
description: Super Mario RPG's wand-waving wizard! Magikoopa fires Corona and Bolt, then morphs into Neo-Kamek!

name: Neo-Kamek
description: Super Mario's upgraded Magikoopa! Neo-Kamek drains HP/MP, fires lightning, and summons Hookbill. Dark sorcery unleashed!

name: belome
description: Super Mario RPG's tongue monster! Belome smacks with tongue, clones enemies, and summons Bahamut. Lick, clone, repeat!

name: Bowser
description: Super Mario's King of the Koopas! Bowser claws, chains, and delivers the crushing Bowser Crush. The original final boss!

name: Bowyer
description: Super Mario RPG's arrow boss. Bowyer rains arrows, zaps static, and freezes with lightning orbs. A living weapon rack!

name: Croco
description: Super Mario RPG's thieving croc! Croco rams, throws bombs, and steals mushrooms AND flowers. Fastest sticky fingers!

name: Culex
description: Super Mario RPG's interdimensional boss! Culex commands four elemental crystals of fire, ice, earth, and darkness. RPG superboss!

name: Dodo
description: Super Mario RPG's angry bird. Dodo pecks, multi-strikes, and knocks foes out. 100% physical, 0% flight!

name: Exor
description: Super Mario RPG's giant sword boss! Exor attacks through multiple parts with fire, ice, and dark stars. Fortress of pain!

name: Geno
description: Super Mario RPG's star warrior! Geno fires Star Gun, Geno Beam, and Geno Flash. Wooden doll with cosmic power!

name: Jinx
description: Super Mario RPG's martial arts master. Jinx triple kicks, quicksilvers, and bombs away. The dojo's ultimate challenge!

name: Johnathan Jones
description: Super Mario RPG's pirate shark king! Jonathan Jones attacks with tridents and drains energy. Honor among thieves!

name: King Calimari
description: Super Mario RPG's giant squid! King Calamari strikes with tentacles and gunks you up. Ink-redibly dangerous!

name: Luigi
description: Super Mario's eternal sidekick! Luigi has one move: Life. He revives the fallen. That's his whole deal. Mama mia!

name: Mack
description: Super Mario RPG's sword-bouncing boss! Mack stomps and blasts fire walls. Simple but scorching!

name: Mallow
description: Super Mario RPG's cloud prince! Mallow thunderbolts, summons Snowy blizzards, and rains stars. Emotional AND powerful!

name: Mario
description: Nintendo's legendary plumber! Mario punches, hammers, and fires orbs. It's-a him, and he's ready to brawl!

name: Smithy (Mask Head)
description: Super Mario RPG's Smithy Mask form. Only knows Recover. Pure healing, zero offense. Strategic patience!

name: Princess Toadstool
description: Super Mario's royal princess! Peach slaps with frying pans and revives allies. Don't underestimate the crown!

name: Raspberry
description: Super Mario RPG's energy-draining wizard. Raspberry blizzards and drains with beams. Fruity name hides a frozen threat!

name: Smithy (Final Form)
description: Super Mario RPG's final boss! Smithy morphs between four devastating head forms. A shapeshifting factory of destruction!

name: Smithy (Sorcerer Head)
description: Super Mario RPG's Smithy Sorcerer form. Rains swords, boulders, spears, and meteors. Pure magical devastation!

name: Smithy (Tank Head)
description: Super Mario RPG's Smithy Tank form. One move: Missile Attack. 100% physical power in pure explosive force!

name: Smithy (Treasure Head)
description: Super Mario RPG's Smithy Treasure form. Status effects ONLY -- mute, chaos, freeze, sleep, poison. Total control!

name: Valentina
description: Super Mario RPG's vain villainess. Valentina blizzards, crystallizes, and diamond saws. Cold beauty, colder attacks!

name: Yaridovich
description: Super Mario RPG's shape-shifting spear boss! Yaridovich stabs, blasts water, and splits in two. Deceptively dangerous!

name: The Cucco Lady
description: Legend of Zelda's chicken lady! The Cucco Lady throws chickens and hides behind chicken shields. Cucco army, ASSEMBLE!

name: Darunia, the Goron Leader
description: Legend of Zelda's Goron chief! Darunia punches, stomps quakes, and throws bomb flowers. Mountain's mightiest warrior!

name: Ganondorf
description: Legend of Zelda's King of Evil! Ganondorf fires energy balls, drains life, and morphs. Triforce of Power incarnate!

name: Gerudo Guard
description: Legend of Zelda's desert warrior. Gerudo Guard slashes with one devastating move. Simple, swift, lethal!

name: The Horse
description: Legend of Zelda's faithful steed! The Horse attacks, stampedes, and returns allies to battle. Epona charges!

name: Impa
description: Legend of Zelda's Sheikah guardian! Impa punches, kicks, and plays Zelda's Lullaby to heal. The princess's protector!

name: Link
description: Legend of Zelda's legendary hero! Link swings sword, throws bombs, fires arrows, and carries a Fairy. The Hero of Time!

name: Moblin
description: Legend of Zelda's piglike brute. Moblin has one attack at 95 strength. Just one. But it HURTS!

name: Nabooru
description: Legend of Zelda's Gerudo sage! Nabooru slashes, steals moves, and heals. A thief with a noble heart!

name: Kaepora Gaebora (Owl)
description: Legend of Zelda's wise owl. Kaepora Gaebora pecks and lectures with Useless Jargon. Want to hear that again? No? TOO BAD!

name: Poe
description: Legend of Zelda's ghostly lantern carrier. Poe has one move: Scare. Pure magic at 100 strength. Terrifying!

name: ReDead
description: Legend of Zelda's undead horror. ReDead drains life and scares foes stiff. Its scream haunts your nightmares!

name: The Running Man
description: Legend of Zelda's unbeatable runner. The Running Man has one move: Run. You will NEVER catch him!

name: Princess Ruto
description: Legend of Zelda's Zora princess! Ruto slaps with flippers, drains health, and summons Morpha. Fishy royalty with attitude!

name: Saria
description: Legend of Zelda's forest sage! Saria kicks, plays her ocarina, and summons forest helpers. Nature's punchy friend!

name: Sheik
description: Legend of Zelda's mysterious Sheikah! Sheik punches, kicks, heals with harp, and hides in shadows. Zelda's secret identity!

name: Stalfos
description: Legend of Zelda's skeletal warrior. Stalfos stabs, slashes, and shields. Undead swordplay from the dungeon depths!

name: Young Link
description: Legend of Zelda's young hero! Young Link slashes, boomerangs, and plays the Ocarina of Time. Small hero, big destiny!

name: Princess Zelda
description: Legend of Zelda's wise princess! Zelda slaps, calls Impa and guards. Royalty commands the battlefield!

name: Kaitou Ace
description: From Codename Sailor V. Kaitou Ace throws cards, fires lightning fields, and reads love fortunes. Phantom thief!

name: Akaishi
description: Original Character. Akaishi blesses, heals, morphs, revives, and fires the Omega Destroyer. A one-character ARMY!

name: Adult Link
description: Legend of Zelda's adult hero rebuilt! Adult Link fires ice and fire arrows and wields Biggoron's Sword. Complete hero!

name: Alpha X
description: Original Character. Alpha X punches, fires buster shots, and copies moves. A custom Mega Man-style warrior!

name: AntiSpawn
description: Original Character. AntiSpawn fires Holy Crosses and Wraths of God. The light side fights back!

name: Aquarias
description: Original Character. Aquarias commands water walls, whirlpools, and ice blasts. The ocean's warrior strikes deep!

name: Annoying Guy from school
description: Original Character. Annoying Guy fires black holes, throws muffins, and screams in French. Maximum chaos!

name: Archer <BY MOG>
description: Original Character inspired by FFT. Archer fires arrows, throws cross vials, and zaps lightning. Tactical marksman!

description: Encrypted ChUB Character. Data corrupted -- but the mystery makes it MORE dangerous! Secrets within!

description: Encrypted ChUB Character. Another corrupted file, another unknown threat. Will you dare to unlock it?

name: Baby Bowser
description: Super Mario's baby Bowser! Rides Donkey and pounds the ground. Small shell, BIG temper tantrum!

name: Planetary BenJer
description: Original Character. Planetary BenJer morphs and channels every Sailor planet crystal power. One-person alignment!

name: Safer Aquila
description: Original Character. Safer Aquila fires thunderbolts, comets, and earth beams. Twelve moves of elemental sky fury!

name: bigbowser
description: A bigger, badder Bowser variant! Bigbowser throws boulders, breathes fireballs, and bashes. King Koopa supersized!

name: Bossman
description: Original Character. Bossman nightstrikes, mega punches, and calls corporate help. The CEO of pain!

name: Callisto
description: Original Character. Callisto channels goddess fire, lightning, and divine ambrosia healing. Olympian fury!

name: Celdie the Great
description: Original Character. Celdie the Great slices wind blades, rushes fire, and heals. A balanced elemental warrior!

name: Chicken
description: Original Character. Another Chicken! Pecks, lays eggs, and summons a COW. The barnyard strikes again!

name: Sailorchuu
description: Original Character. Sailorchuu crunches earth, mouse kicks, and reveals spirits. An electric mouse magical girl!

name: Sailorcoronis
description: Original Character. Sailorcoronis summons tornadoes and hurricane fists. Wind-powered magical fury!

name: Angel CrsisMoon
description: Original Character. Angel CrsisMoon fires star bombs, shields, heals, and revives souls. Celestial golden guardian!

name: Dark Angel Nikki
description: Original Character. Dark Angel Nikki electrifies with dark powers and raises shadow barriers. Darkness perfected!

name: Darkchild
description: Original Character. Darkchild blesses, regenerates, poisons, disguises, revives, and drains. Twelve moves of dark mastery!

name: Tekkaman Dead
description: From Tekkaman Blade. Tekkaman Dead slices, soars, and fires the devastating Voltekker. Space knight of destruction!

name: Decheapied KatLioness
description: Original Character. Decheapied KatLioness steals moves, revives with kisses, and grills foes. Wild cat with tricks!

name: Dorothy
description: From The Wizard of Oz! Dorothy drops houses, summons Glenda, and sics TinMan, Lion, and Scarecrow. No place like the arena!

name: 1st Time Drugee
description: Original Character. 1st Time Drugee attacks with substances and a fire-stompin' grocery bag. Just say NO to losing!

name: Masta' O Echo's
description: Original Character. Masta O Echoes reflects healing, massive, razor, and instant echoes. Sound bounces back deadlier!

name: Goddess Elmo
description: Original Character. Goddess Elmo fires earth crystal blasts, shields, and revives. Elmo wants to PLAY... for keeps!

name: ENIAC
description: Original Character. ENIAC tosses vacuum tubes and throws chips. The world's first computer fights back!

name: The Epic Child
description: Original Character. The Epic Child fires rainbow beams and apocalypse dreams. A child prodigy of cosmic power!

name: Evangelion Unit-05
description: From Neon Genesis Evangelion! Eva Unit-05 hits with lance, bites, and earns God's reward. Get in the robot!

name: Final SpIdErM64
description: Original Character. Final SpIdErM64 fires hyper assaults and inflictor energy. A web of mysterious power!

name: Gabrielle
description: From Xena: Warrior Princess. Gabrielle wields her staff and summons Hope. The bard becomes the warrior!

name: Sailor Galatica
description: Original Character. Sailor Galatica channels ALL Sailor planet attacks at once. Every element in one fighter!

name: Gally
description: From Battle Angel Alita. Gally blitzes with martial arts and energy fists. A combat cyborg at full throttle!

name: Gangrel
description: From Vampire: The Masquerade. Gangrel shifts forms and channels earth spirits. A shape-shifting vampire!

name: Garr
description: Original Character. Garr fires wind arrows, storms, cyclones, and Void Sword slashes. Master of wind and blade!

name: Hellectic BenJer
description: Original Character. Hellectic BenJer heals with pendants and cloaks in darkness. Mystical pendant power!

name: Hillary Clinton
description: A humorous political fighter. Hillary attacks, whips flames, and fires psy waves. Campaign trail combat!

name: Hyper Sonic
description: From Sonic the Hedgehog. Hyper Sonic zooms with figure 8s and tornado spins. Maximum speed, maximum power!

name: Evil Ima
description: Original Character. Evil Ima hurls asteroids, drains life, and stops time. Space-powered villainy!

name: indigo
description: Original Character inspired by D&D. Indigo casts Magic Missile, Flame Strike, and Wish. Classic wizard unleashed!

name: Infinity Sage
description: Original Character. Infinity Sage fires power pulses, meteor hails, and time blasts. Sorcerous might!

name: Sailor Infinity
description: Original Character. Sailor Infinity fires light domes and steals power. Unlimited magical energy!

name: Zodiac Knight Jase.
description: Original Character inspired by FFT. Zodiac Knight Jase poisons, petrifies, and fires Grand Cross. Astrological doom!

name: Justin Stacewell
description: Original Character. Justin Stacewell yawns, coughs, and attacks with Barney sets and Oreos. Chaotic randomness!

name: Kane
description: From WWE! Kane chokeslams, punches, and calls corporation help. The Big Red Machine enters the ring!

name: Kestra the Lotus Healer
description: Original Character. Kestra heals with lotus blooms, revives allies, and devastates with gemstones. Nature's fury!

name: Kat-In-Da-Hat
description: From Dr. Seuss! Kat-In-Da-Hat summons Dr. Seuss, reads stories, and tosses milk. Fun and fungus for everyone!

name: Kronos
description: Original Character. Kronos explodes, creates black holes, and teleport slashes. Time and space bend to his will!

name: Lapras
description: Pokemon's gentle sea traveler! Lapras fires Ice Beam, Blizzard, and Hydro Pump. Majestic ice-water powerhouse!

name: Legendary Zero
description: Original Character. Legendary Zero flashes, fires hell blasts, and tornado slashes. A dark hero!

name: Sailor Malkie Way
description: Original Character. Sailor Malkie Way freezes space, calls Outer Senshi, and heals. Galactic magical girl power!

name: Mankind
description: From WWE! Mankind delivers DDTs, brain busters, and chair shots. Mrs. Foley's baby boy HURTS you!

name: Supa Sailor Echo Man
description: Original Character. Supa Sailor Echo Man reflects twelve echoes for healing, damage, and life. Sound warfare!

name: Sailor Mau
description: Original Character. Sailor Mau fires star storms and claws foes. A guardian cat senshi!

name: Mega-Machine
description: Original Character. Mega-Machine launches kitties and discharges massively. A cat-powered death machine!

name: Mega Man X
description: Capcom's Blue Bomber upgraded! Mega Man X fires X-Buster, Storm Tornado, and Hadoken. The reploid hero returns!

name: Sailor Mermaid
description: Original Character. Sailor Mermaid fires fire tsunamis and water spires. Ocean warrior mixing fire and water!

name: Mike M
description: Original Character. Mike M freezes with ice, heals, and mega punches. Simple but effective elemental combat!

name: Mistress M L
description: Original Character. Mistress M L tosses berets, dreams of Bill, and summons wind. Quirky hat-throwing fighter!

name: Sailor Musica
description: Original Character. Sailor Musica strikes with lightning sonatas and ocean concertos. Music IS the weapon!

name: Noah K 17
description: Original Character. Noah K 17 slashes with a gunblade and casts Cure4. Final Fantasy VIII vibes!

name: Philia
description: From Tales of Destiny. Philia bombs, thunder blades, and inspects enemies. Explosive mage with knowledge!

name: Neo-Psychoman
description: Original Character. Neo-Psychoman fires attacks, morphs, steals moves, and heals the team. Swiss-army fighter!

description: Encrypted ChUB Character. Psychoman's data lurks within corrupted code. A hidden warrior awaits!

name: PunK
description: Original Character. PunK throws CDs, rocks out with Nirvana heals, and transforms. Music is life and death!

name: Encrypted ChUB Character
description: Encrypted ChUB Character. Another warrior locked behind encryption. The unknown is most terrifying!

name: Relm Arrowny
description: Final Fantasy VI's young artist! Relm sketches enemies to copy them and wields elemental rods. Art imitates DEATH!

name: RoNiN's Shadow
description: Original Character. RoNiN's Shadow fires shadow roses and heals from darkness. A ghostly blade in the night!

name: Rutee Katrea
description: From Tales of Destiny. Rutee heals, cures, and freezes foes with ice tornados. The ultimate support mage!

name: Saffiru
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Moon prince. Saffiru fires dark energy and summons an angry Dimando. Brains of the Black Moon!

name: Saffiru
description: Sailor Moon's Dark Moon prince variant. Another Saffiru with dark crescent beams. Double the dark prince trouble!

name: Supah Flare
description: Original Character. Supah Flare heals, tornadoes, punches lightning, and fires shadow destroyers. Multi-elemental warrior!

name: The RoNiN SeNsHi
description: Original Character. The RoNiN SeNsHi strikes with twin roses and drains energy. A ronin magical girl!

name: Sheikah
description: Original Character. Sheikah wields shadow blades, hyper beams, and healing spells. Ultimate Zelda-inspired ninja!

name: shy guy corps
description: Super Mario's masked minions! Shy Guy Corps bounces and shoots seeds. Small, cute, and persistent!

name: spawn
description: From Image Comics! Spawn wraps chains, fires guns, and regenerates. Hell's champion with dwindling power!

name: SuperSailor EeveeKat3! *SPECIAL EDITION*
description: Original Character. SuperSailor EeveeKat3 Special Edition blesses, blasts, and steals supers. Premium Eevee warrior!

name: Spork
description: Original Character. Spork digs with a Shovel of Doom and tornadoes. Utensil-based warfare from the 4th dimension!

name: SuperSailorStar SuperSaiyan
description: Original Character. SuperSailorStar SuperSaiyan fires twelve cosmic attacks. Dragon Ball meets Sailor Moon at MAX!

name: SQ L SL
description: Original Character. SQ L SL variant kills, kicks, fireballs, morphs, and learns moves. Jack-of-all-trades brawler!

name: SSJ4 ChaoDenks
description: Original Character. SSJ4 ChaoDenks destroys planets and fires Kamehameha. Dragon Ball power at maximum!

name: SuperSailor EeveeKat3!
description: Original Character. SuperSailor EeveeKat3 blesses, blasts with Eevee staff, and steals supers. Cute Eevee power!

name: SSLRranma
description: Original Character. SSLRranma fires impulses, ice knives, and holy star strikes. Multi-elemental chaos warrior!

name: Stahn Aileron
description: From Tales of Destiny. Stahn Aileron charges sword, fires hell fire, and Dragon Blades. The Swordian master!

name: sumo brother
description: Super Mario's massive enemy! Sumo Brother stomps fire and karate chops. 100/100 stats, maximum overkill!

name: Supa Gau
description: Final Fantasy VI's wild child! Supa Gau rages into beast forms and chows dried meat. Untamed Veldt fury!

name: Thunderbird
description: Original Character. Thunderbird fires thunderbolts and storms while healing. Pure electric devastation!

name: Toreador
description: From Vampire: The Masquerade. Toreador sings sweet songs, reads auras, and drains blood. Artistic vampire!

name: Toto
description: From The Wizard of Oz! Toto inflicts rabies, leaps, and goes psycho. Dorothy's little dog has gone MAD!

name: Tracy
description: Original Character. Tracy blasts with radio stations, drains energy, and regenerates. A resourceful scrapper!

name: TryClyde
description: Super Mario Bros 2's three-headed snake! TryClyde breathes flames and heals with kerosene. Triple fire trouble!

name: Ultimate(?) Aquila
description: Original Character. Ultimate Aquila fires homing shocks, quakes, and fireballs. Powered-up elemental blaster!

name: Undertaker
description: From WWE! The Undertaker punches, rope walks, and chokeslams. Ministry of Darkness. Rest in PEACE!

name: Venture
description: Original Character. Venture swings scepters, raises night barriers, and fires flame fury. Masked adventurer!

name: Wicked witch of the west
description: From The Wizard of Oz! Wicked Witch summons flying monkeys and fires flames. Surrender Dorothy... or burn!

name: Xena Warrior Princess
description: From Xena: Warrior Princess! Xena tosses chakrams, slashes swords, and delivers the Pinch. AYIYIYIYIYI!

name: Zanryutyou
description: Original Character. Zanryutyou calls twelve buddies for help, revives, and uppercuts. Friendship IS the weapon!

name: Adult Link
description: Legend of Zelda's adult hero variant. Adult Link wields Biggoron's Sword and fires Din's Fire. Complete Hero of Time!

name: Beavis
description: From Beavis and Butt-Head! Beavis farts shadow damage, chugs Crappuccinos, and vomits poison. Disgusting but effective!

name: Big Scary Tank
description: Original Character. Big Scary Tank fires cannons, iron balls, and double blasts. Pure armored devastation!

name: Sailor Not Quite So Cheapy-Cheapy
description: Original Character. Sailor Not Quite So Cheapy fires cheapy beams and cheezy attacks. 100/100 stats say otherwise!

name: Earthworm Jim
description: From the classic game! Earthworm Jim fires lasers and plasma guns. A suited-up worm saving the galaxy!

name: AOL Lamer
description: Original Character. AOL Lamer scrolls shadow, nukes fire, and mails viruses. 90s internet warfare at its finest!

name: Lemming
description: From the classic puzzle game! Lemming climbs, bashes, builds, and blocks. The power of sheer determination!

name: Q
description: From Star Trek! Q teleports, freezes time, and grants godly powers. Omnipotent and insufferably smug!

name: Team Rocket
description: Pokemon's infamous villains! Team Rocket commands Weezing and Arbok. Blasting off in style!

name: Roll
description: Mega Man's helper robot variant! Roll punches, heals, and fires deadly bouquets. Even Dr. Light is impressed!

name: Santa Claus
description: The jolly gift-giver enters combat! Santa throws coal, heals, and Kringle Krushes. Naughty list means PAIN!

name: Swordsman
description: Original Character. Swordsman slashes, fireballs, heals, and power breaks. Classic warrior archetype done right!

name: Lord Ashram
description: Record of Lodoss War's dark knight! Lord Ashram delivers genocide attacks and mounts his horse. Marmo's deadliest!

name: Emperor Beld
description: Record of Lodoss War's emperor! Beld wields the Demon Sword SoulCrusher. The conquering dark lord!

name: Deedlit
description: Record of Lodoss War's high elf! Deedlit summons Sylph, Undine, Efreet, and Jin. Four elements at her command!

name: Etoh
description: Record of Lodoss War's faithful priest! Etoh heals, blesses, and smites with Holy Light. Parn's loyal companion!

name: King Fahn
description: Record of Lodoss War's legendary king! Fahn wields the Holy Sword of Falis. A true warrior king!

name: Ghim
description: Record of Lodoss War's dwarven warrior! Ghim hurls axes and chugs healing potions. Short but mighty!

name: Captain Jebra
description: Record of Lodoss War's loyal captain! Jebra equips his shield and arrests criminals. Law on the battlefield!

name: Prince Jester
description: Record of Lodoss War's wyvern prince! Jester mounts his dragon and throws spears. Aerial assault royalty!

name: Karla
description: Record of Lodoss War's grey witch! Karla casts fog, chaos, lightning, ice, and fire. Ancient magical might!

name: King Kashue
description: Record of Lodoss War's mercenary king! Kashue slashes and strikes from horseback. The desert warrior king!

name: Leylia
description: Record of Lodoss War's gentle priestess! Leylia heals, cures, and fires divine rays. Faith made manifest!

name: Neese
description: Record of Lodoss War's supreme priestess! Neese mass heals and fires holy warrior beams. Strongest healer alive!

name: Orson
description: Record of Lodoss War's berserker! Orson rages, slashes, and power strikes. When the berserker awakens, RUN!

name: Parn
description: Record of Lodoss War's heroic knight! Parn charges with sword slashes and thrusts. The Free Knight of Lodoss!

name: Pirotessa
description: Record of Lodoss War's dark elf! Pirotessa summons elementals and whips foes. Dark elegance in combat!

name: Shiris
description: Record of Lodoss War's swordswoman! Shiris saves travelers and delivers justice cuts. A wandering hero!

name: Slayn
description: Record of Lodoss War's sage wizard! Slayn raises barriers and fires lightning balls. Wise mage power!

name: Wagnard
description: Record of Lodoss War's necromancer! Wagnard curses, summons zombies, and fires death bolts. Dark sorcery!

name: Woodchuck
description: Record of Lodoss War's cunning thief! Woodchuck throws daggers and steals healing potions. Quick hands!

name: Wort
description: Record of Lodoss War's elder sage! Wort raises force fields and casts fireblasts and thunder. Ancient power!

name: Kaos, The Ancient
description: Original Character. Kaos the Ancient wields a staff, channels beams, and heals. Balanced chaos!

name: Anubis of Cruelty
description: From Ronin Warriors! Anubis of Cruelty slices with morning stars and quakes fear. Dynasty armor aggression!

name: Dais of Illusion
description: From Ronin Warriors! Dais of Illusion spins webs, hurls spiked balls, and creates illusions. Spider deception!

name: Hariel of Inferno
description: From Ronin Warriors! Hariel of Inferno channels pure fire through every attack. Flame, flare, and healing fire!

name: Kale of Corruption
description: From Ronin Warriors! Kale of Corruption claws through darkness and summons the undead. Shadow warrior!

name: Lady Kayura
description: From Ronin Warriors! Lady Kayura slices, dives, and combos with Star Sword Scream. Dynasty's finest!

name: Kento of Hardrock
description: From Ronin Warriors! Kento of Hardrock hammers and Iron Rock Crushes. The earth trembles when he fights!

name: Saber Strike
description: From Ronin Warriors! Saber Strike slashes, stabs, and summons Black Blaze. Winged angel of the blade!

name: Mukara of Black Inferno
description: From Ronin Warriors! Mukara of Black Inferno burns and boomerangs. Dark fire's ultimate vessel!

name: Rowen of Strata
description: From Ronin Warriors! Rowen of Strata fires 100 arrows and Arrow Shock Waves. Sky warrior rains justice!

name: Ryo of Wildfire
description: From Ronin Warriors! Ryo of Wildfire kicks, fires, and flares. The leader's wildfire burns brightest!

name: Sage of Halo
description: From Ronin Warriors! Sage of Halo bolts lightning and heals with holy light. Thunder and honor in one blade!

name: Sai of Torrent
description: From Ronin Warriors! Sai of Torrent waves and Super Wave Smashes. Ocean power crashes down!

name: Sekhmet of Venom
description: From Ronin Warriors! Sekhmet of Venom poisons with six arms. Everything he touches is TOXIC!

name: Ami
description: Sailor Moon's Ami in civilian form. Spin kicks, computer scans, and ice ribbons. Smart AND scrappy!

name: ChibChib
description: Sailor Moon's Chibi-Chibi civilian form. Falls down, gives candy, and fires legendary chalice blasts. Adorably chaotic!

name: Chibi-usa
description: Sailor Moon's Chibi-Usa civilian form. Luna-P gadgets, Crescent Moon beams, and Ginzuishou blasts. Future princess!

name: Haruka
description: Sailor Moon's Haruka in civilian form. Bashes, jaw punches, and races motorcycles into foes. Raw untransformed power!

name: Helios
description: Sailor Moon's Helios in human form. Fires nightmares, heals with dream mirrors, and charges with his horn. Dream guardian!

name: Hotaru
description: Sailor Moon's Hotaru in civilian form. Makes friends, fires death beams, and returns heart crystals. Quiet but apocalyptic!

name: Makato
description: Sailor Moon's Makoto in civilian form. Rose earrings, punches, cat fights, and home cooking. Tough with a tender heart!

name: Makoto
description: Sailor Moon's Makoto variant. Same tough girl -- earrings, punches, and cooking. Strongest civilian Scout!

name: Mamoru
description: Sailor Moon's Mamoru in civilian form. Healing roses, garlic, and sword slashes. The prince fights his way!

name: Michiru
description: Sailor Moon's Michiru civilian form. Beauty stuns, mirror heals, and violin smashes. Elegant untransformed destruction!

name: Minako
description: Sailor Moon's Minako civilian form. Gymnastic stomps, nurse heals, and business cards. The original V, untransformed!

name: Rei
description: Sailor Moon's Rei in civilian form. Ofuda charms, sacred flames, and crows Phobos and Deimos. Shrine maiden fury!

name: Sanjouin
description: Sailor Moon's Nephrite as Sanjouin. Youma symbols, cars, and star guidance. Disguised dark general!

name: Seiya
description: Sailor Moon's Seiya civilian form. Football tackles, guitar smashes, and HP-stealing songs. The idol that HITS!

name: Setsuna
description: Sailor Moon's Setsuna civilian form. Appears from darkness and strikes with the garnet orb. Mysterious time guardian!

name: Taiki
description: Sailor Moon's Taiki civilian form. Uploads viruses, hacks computers, and encodes pages. Digital warrior idol!

name: Usagi
description: Sailor Moon's Usagi civilian form. Stuffs face, screams, cries, and complains. Somehow still wins! Classic Usagi!

name: Yaten
description: Sailor Moon's Yaten civilian form. Camera beams, drains with film, and smart alec remarks. Paparazzi from HELL!

name: Anakaris
description: Darkstalkers' ancient pharaoh! Anakaris dances coffins and casts Pharaoh Magic. The mummy king rises to fight!

name: Aulbath
description: Darkstalkers' merman warrior! Aulbath fires sonic waves and unleashes Sea Rage. The ocean's scaled champion!

name: Bishamon
description: Darkstalkers' possessed samurai! Bishamon soul chokes and stone sentences. A haunted armor of fury!

name: Bulleta
description: Darkstalkers' little red riding psycho! Bulleta fires missiles, uzis, and mines with a smile. Most dangerous girl!

name: Demitri Maximoff
description: Darkstalkers' noble vampire! Demitri fires Chaos Flare and Midnight Pleasure. The lord of the night bites!

name: Donovan
description: Darkstalkers' vampire hunter variant. Donovan channels flame, lightning, and blizzard swords. Demon slayer!

name: Felicia
description: Darkstalkers' catgirl variant! Felicia kicks, spikes, and dances. Alley cat fights with purr-fect rhythm!

name: Gallon
description: Darkstalkers' werewolf warrior! Gallon fires beast cannons and dragon cannons. The wolf howls for blood!

name: Jedah
description: Darkstalkers' demon noble! Jedah slashes with divine and demonic attacks. Twisted lord of demons!

name: Lei-Lei
description: Darkstalkers' hopping vampire! Lei-Lei smashes with gongs and throws ancient weapons. Jiangshi wallop!

name: Lilith Aensland
description: Darkstalkers' succubus clone variant! Lilith fires soul flashes and the Gloomy Puppet Show. Morrigan's other half!

name: Morrigan Aensland
description: Darkstalkers' succubus queen variant! Morrigan fires soul fists and darkness illusions. Eternally deadly!

name: Phobos
description: Darkstalkers' robot warrior! Phobos fires ice lasers and genocide vulcans. Cold metal, hot firepower!

name: Pyron
description: Darkstalkers' cosmic fire demon! Pyron blazes with Zodiac Fire and Piled Hell. A living sun of destruction!

name: Queen Bee
description: Darkstalkers' insect queen! Queen Bee strikes with coded attacks. Mysterious and buzzing with power!

name: Sasquatch
description: Darkstalkers' friendly yeti! Sasquatch breathes big, towers big, and freezes big. Everything is BIG!

name: Victor Gerdenheim
description: Darkstalkers' Frankenstein monster! Victor smashes with Giga Fist and Thunder Break. Stitched-up power!

name: Lord Zabel
description: Darkstalkers' zombie rocker! Lord Zabel hurricanes death and dunks from hell. Rock and roll from the grave!

name: Frisk
description: A determined human child who fell into the Underground. Their unwavering DETERMINATION lets them persist through any challenge.

name: Sans
description: A lazy skeleton who serves illegal hot dogs and terrible puns. Don't let the smile fool you — he's the most dangerous monster in the Underground.

name: Papyrus
description: The GREAT Papyrus! A cool skeleton who dreams of joining the Royal Guard. His bone attacks are fearsome, but his heart is pure.

name: Undyne
description: Captain of the Royal Guard. A fierce warrior whose spear attacks and unbreakable will make her the Underground's greatest fighter.

name: Undyne the Undying
description: Fueled by the determination of every monster in the Underground, Undyne has surpassed her mortal limits. She will not die. She REFUSES to die.

name: Alphys
description: The Royal Scientist of the Underground. Nervous and anime-obsessed, but brilliant with technology. Her inventions pack a surprising punch.

name: Mettaton EX
description: The Underground's biggest star! Fabulous, dramatic, and dangerously entertaining. His ratings are TO DIE FOR — literally.

name: Mettaton NEO
description: Mettaton's combat form, designed by Dr. Alphys for battle. Armed to the teeth with weapons, but perhaps not as tough as he looks.

name: Toriel
description: Caretaker of the Ruins and former Queen. A kind, motherly boss monster who wields powerful fire magic and healing to protect the children she loves.

name: Asgore
description: King of all Monsters. A gentle giant burdened by duty, wielding a mighty trident and fire magic. He fights not out of hatred, but tragic resolve.

name: Flowey
description: A sinister golden flower with a twisted smile. In this world, it's kill or BE killed. Don't trust the friendly pellets.

name: Asriel Dreemurr
description: The God of Hyperdeath. Asriel has absorbed every SOUL in the Underground and ascended to absolute power. The Angel of the prophecy who will set everyone free.

name: Napstablook
description: A melancholy ghost who makes music alone in their house. Their acid tears are surprisingly dangerous. They just want to feel something...

name: Muffet
description: The spider girl who runs the bake sale. Behind her cute ahuhuhu~ lies a ruthless businesswoman with an army of spiders and lethal web attacks.

name: Mad Dummy
description: A ghost possessing a cotton dummy with SERIOUS anger issues. They're MAD because you didn't talk to them. Now they're going to DESTROY you.

name: Temmie
description: hOI!!! i'm tEMMIE!! tEMMIE go to cooleg and now tEMMIE fight in battle!! vibrate with anticipation!!

name: Greater Dog
description: A tiny dog inside a massive suit of armor. Part of the Royal Guard's canine unit. Loves pets, belly rubs, and smashing things with a giant spear.

name: Lesser Dog
description: An excitable dog guard whose neck extends when pet. Simple-minded but enthusiastic, armed with a sword and an unending desire for head pats.

name: Chara
description: The first human to fall into the Underground. Once Asriel's best friend, now a sinister force of destruction. Their smile is not a kind one.

name: W.D. Gaster
description: The former Royal Scientist who fell into his own creation and was scattered across time and space. He speaks in hands and exists in the void between worlds.
